text_query: device to automatically back up photos from my phone and my partner's phone
reasonings: This personal cloud storage device explicitly states it plugs into a Wi-Fi router to automatically back up photos and videos from your phone, which directly addresses the query's need for an automatic multi-phone backup solution.
